title: lithocarpus kontumensis
intro: Lithocarpus kontumensis is a species of plant in the beech family (Fagaceae), native to Vietnam. It is valued for its medicinal properties, including its ability to reduce inflammation and improve cardiovascular health. The plant has been used to treat various health issues, such as fever, rheumatism, and respiratory problems, thanks to its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties. Lithocarpus kontumensis can be prepared as a decoction, made by boiling the plant's parts in water, which is then consumed as a tea or used as a topical treatment.
